---
title: "Working papers"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
# Cornerstone Economics Working Papers

Open-access research on resilience, adaptive capacity, and small-state economic policy. Each paper is archived on Zenodo and assigned a DOI.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="paper-list" id="paper-list"></div>

<script>
fetch('papers.json')
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(papers => {
    const list = document.getElementById('paper-list');
    papers.sort((a, b) => b.id.localeCompare(a.id));
    papers.forEach(p => {
      const card = document.createElement('article');
      card.className = 'paper-card';
      const doiPart = p.doi
        ? `<a href="https://doi.org/${p.doi}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>`
        : `<span class="meta-tag muted">DOI pending</span>`;
      const pdfPart = p.pdf
        ? `<a href="${p.pdf}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF</a>`
        : `<span class="meta-tag muted">PDF pending</span>`;
      const repoPart = p.repo
        ? `<a href="${p.repo}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Source</a>`
        : '';
      const citePart = p.doi
        ? `<a href="https://citation.crosscite.org/?doi=${p.doi}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Cite</a>`
        : '';
      card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="paper-number">${p.id} &middot; ${p.date}</div>
        <h2 class="paper-title">${p.title}</h2>
        <div class="paper-authors">${p.authors.join(', ')}</div>
        <p class="paper-abstract">${p.abstract}</p>
        <div class="paper-meta">
          ${pdfPart}
          ${doiPart}
          ${repoPart}
          ${citePart}
          <span class="meta-tag muted">${p.jel ? 'JEL ' + p.jel.join(', ') : ''}</span>
        </div>
      `;
      list.appendChild(card);
    });
    if (papers.length === 0) {
      list.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center;color:#666;">No papers published yet. The first paper is in production.</p>';
    }
  })
  .catch(() => {
    document.getElementById('paper-list').innerHTML =
      '<p style="text-align:center;color:#666;">Paper list could not be loaded.</p>';
  });
</script>
```
